creator: qroxana@protonmail.com
text:
It seems dwc no longer works on the BananaPi M1 A20 since the
432ae724e6ebac4696a7baf5020e2445db06dc2f dwc changes.

dwc0: <A20 Gigabit Ethernet Controller> mem 0x1c50000-0x1c5ffff irq 72 on simplebus0
dwc0: clk_set_assigned failed
device_attach: dwc0 attach returned 2
